label: Discovery + karyotype (coupled)
description: Three coupled analyses that take raw window-band / L3 / dosage signals through to polarised per-sample karyotype calls. Standalone but tightly chained: candidate_registry → unpolarized_karyotype_calls → polarized_karyotype_calls. Sibling adapters share the same input scope but each is its own registry entry.

analyses.rationale: produces candidate_registry + chain_evidence from raw signals
classifies each (sample, candidate) into 0/1/2 from dosage + chain evidence
adds direction; not required if downstream consumers tolerate unpolarized

layers.rationale: core output — the candidate axis for all downstream work
provenance trail — which window/site/dosage hit promoted this candidate
the existing manuscript file-kind layer; this package's polarized output supersedes manual curation when it stabilises

panels.rationale: renders candidate_registry rows for the current candidate scope

pages.rationale: this package contributes the two required panels of page 6
